message:
feat(microsoft365): add readiness profiles, error classification, and fix Graph API paths

Connector gains structured self-check infrastructure:
- readiness_profile(): maps auth mode to health/degraded status with
  human-readable explanations for operators
- classify_self_check_error(): categorizes Graph API errors (rate limit,
  token expired, permissions missing, resource not found) with retryable
  flag for automated remediation
- operator_action_for_auth_mode(): per-mode guidance strings for operators

Integration tests fixed: mock paths corrected from /users/me/... to
/me/... to match the actual Microsoft Graph API v1.0 endpoint structure
(the /me alias doesn't need the /users prefix).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
